description:
A small Bureau contract: put down the skeletons that have walked out of the broken wardstone vault. One or two of them, slow but relentless. No story. Just a fight.

Triggers:
1. mission_intro (aigm): broken-ward setting, skeletons rising.
2. mission_done (set_flag): on last enemy death, flips `mission_complete=true`, clears `mission_pending`.
3. mission_done_aigm: nudges player to LEAVE MISSION.
customIntroduction: The broken ward sits where a chapel-house collapsed half a century ago. The wardstone in its centre cracks a little more every year. You can see them as you approach: two figures in the ruin, dry and articulated, picking themselves up out of the rubble with the patient persistence of things that have no use for pain. They mark you and begin to walk.
customContext: SKELETON MISSION — SIMPLE CONTRACT FIGHT. Two skeletons, hostile, never flee, never parley. Vulnerable to bludgeoning, immune to poison. Player completes when both are down.
objective: Put down the skeletons. Return to Vask.

then.message: Open at the broken ward. Two skeletons walking toward the player. One short paragraph, then the fight begins.
Contract complete. Return to Vask to turn it in.
Skeletons down. The ruin is still. One-line cleanup beat, then point the player at the LEAVE MISSION button to return to Vask.
